basic_details.job_title: Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 17 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Engineer / Assistant Manager / Assistant Officer (Executive Category - Group B)
basic_details.job_location: Anywhere in KRCL jurisdiction (Maharashtra, Goa, Karnataka, Kerala)
basic_details.short_information: The Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL), a Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Railways, Government of India, has officially announced the Executive Recruitment 2026 through Employment Notification No. CO/P-R/01/2026. The notification was released on 04th May 2026 at Konkan Railway Official Website for recruitment to Assistant Engineer, Assistant Manager, Assistant Officer, and other Junior Scale Executive (Group-B) posts. A total of 17 vacancies are available for eligible candidates possessing qualifications such as Engineering Degree, MBA, MBBS, CA/CMA, and related professi

application_fee.details: Application fee of Rs. 590/- (Rs.500 + GST Rs.90) to be paid via NEFT in favour of Konkan Railway Corporation Limited. | SC/ST/Ex-Servicemen/Female/Minorities/EBC candidates are eligible for fee refund after appearing in the selection process.

age_limit.details: Age Limit: 18 to 30 years as on 01-04-2026

qualification.details: AICTE recognised Bachelor‟s Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent with minimum 60% marks (equivalent CGPA) Valid Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering score – 2023,2024,2025 is compulsory in GATE Paper-Civil Engineering. ( GATE CODE-CE) MBBS from MCI / NMC recognized Medical College and permanent registration of State Medical Council. Bachelor‟s Degree in any stream or its equivalent and full time Master‟s degree in Management (MBA/MMS/PGDM etc. or with whatever name it is known as) with Specialization in Marketing or Supply Chain Management or Operations or Logistics or Sales with minimum 60% marks (for both graduation and MBA) for UR/OBC post. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent with minimum 60% marks (equivalent CGPA). Bachelor‟s Degree of Engineering in Mechanical/Civil/Electrical/Electronics or its equivalent with minimum 60% marks (equivalent CGPA). Bachelor‟s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 60% marks (equivalent CGPA). Chartered Accountant (CA)/Cost and Management Account (CMA) | Discipline-wise Minimum Qualification | (Full details as per notification including GATE/CAT requirements, minimum percentage, eligible branches etc. are given in the official PDF) | Minimum Qualifying Marks (Wherever applicable as per selection stages)

selection_process: Written Examination (for AMO & AFA and if required for others) Presentation on given topic Personal Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
Weightage (for GATE/CAT based posts): Best valid GATE/CAT Score 50% + Presentation 25% + Interview 25%
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format and sent through Speed Post / Registered Post only to the given address so as to reach on or before 24.05.2026 (17:30 hrs).
Office Address: Senior Personnel Officer/Recruitment & Establishment, 4th Floor, Konkan Railway Corporation Ltd, Belapur Bhavan, Sector-11, Plot No.6, CBD Belapur, Navi Mumbai - 400614
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates should submit only one application for one post. Applications received after the last date or incomplete applications will be rejected. Serving KRCL employees fulfilling eligibility can also apply. All candidates must carry original documents at the time of Document Verification. Canvassing in any form shall disqualify the candidature.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications for Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026 is 24 May 2026 up to 05:30 PM. Candidates interested in applying for various Group-B Executive posts must ensure that their offline application form reaches the KRCL office before the deadline. Late applications will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) has announced approximately 17 vacancies for various Executive category posts. The recruitment includes vacancies for Assistant Engineer, Assistant Manager, Assistant Medical Officer, Assistant Traffic Manager, Assistant Financial Advisor, Assistant Electrical Engineer, and several other Group-B executive positions.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are available under KRCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment notification includes posts such as Assistant Engineer (Civil), Assistant Medical Officer, Assistant Manager (Information Technology), Assistant Traffic Manager, Assistant Materials Manager, Assistant Mechanical Engineer, Assistant Signal & Telecom Engineer, Assistant Financial Advisor, Assistant Electrical Engineer, Assistant Personnel Officer, and Assistant Deputy General Manager. Different eligibility conditions apply for each post.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary according to the post applied for. Engineering posts generally require Bachelor’s Degree in relevant disciplines along with valid GATE scores, while management-related posts require MBA qualifications and valid CAT scores. Medical Officer posts require MBBS qualification, and Accounts posts require CA or CMA certification from recognized institutions

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for KRCL Executive posts should be between 18 and 30 years of age as on 01 April 2026. Reserved category candidates such as OBC and SC applicants are eligible for upper age relaxation according to government norms. Additional age relaxation is also available for serving KRCL employees fulfilling eligibility conditions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for KRCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants need to pay an application fee of Rs. 590/- including GST through NEFT in favor of Konkan Railway Corporation Limited. However, SC, ST, Ex-Servicemen, Female, Minority, and Economically Backward Class candidates are eligible for fee refund after appearing in the selection process conducted by KRCL.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process may include Written Examination, Presentation on a given topic, Personal Interview, Document Verification, and Medical Examination. For GATE and CAT based posts, weightage will be given to valid scorecards along with interview and presentation performance. Final selection will depend on merit and eligibility verification.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit the application form in prescribed format through Speed Post or Registered Post only. The completed application should be sent to the Senior Personnel Officer/Recruitment & Establishment at KRCL Corporate Office, CBD Belapur, Navi Mumbai before the last date. Online applications are not accepted for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered under KRCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salary under the 7th CPC Pay Matrix Level-8 with pay scale ranging from Rs. 47,600 to Rs. 1,51,100. In addition to basic pay, candidates may also receive allowances and benefits applicable to Konkan Railway employees according to organizational rules.

faq.question: Q10. What important instructions should candidates remember before applying?
faq.answer: Candidates should carefully read the official notification and ensure that all eligibility conditions are fulfilled before applying. Only one application per post is allowed, and incomplete applications may be rejected. Applicants must also carry original documents during document verification, and canvassing in any form can lead to disqualification from the recruitment process.
